features.title: In-match ESC pause menu overlay
features.summary: In-match ESC pause menu overlay with Resume Game, Leave Match, SFX/Music toggles, and a How-to-Play controls reference. Local-only pause (neutralizes the local player's input while the host-authoritative match continues live for everyone).
acceptance_criteria: Pressing ESC during an active match (not in lobby) opens a centered pause overlay; pressing ESC or Resume closes it.
While paused the local warlock stops moving and casting; the match keeps running for other players.
SFX and Music toggles in the pause menu stay in sync with the HUD audio controls.
How to Play shows an accurate keybind reference built from the live spellbook and slot hotkeys.
Leave Match disconnects (host or client) and returns cleanly to the main menu with no leaked render loop; re-host/re-join works afterward.
An involuntary disconnect resets match state so the pause overlay cannot appear over the main menu.

features.title: Region-based online matchmaking, leaderboards, and accounts
features.summary: Region-based online matchmaking, persistent leaderboards, and account system backed by Supabase
acceptance_criteria: Players can host online rooms that appear in the room browser for their region
Quick Match finds the best open room in the player's region
Match results are submitted to Supabase and surfaced in the leaderboard
ELO rating is computed server-side per submit-match edge function
Guest/LAN play works fully without Supabase credentials
Supabase-disabled notices appear on online/leaderboard/account screens when not configured

sub_issues.scope: Supabase migrations, RLS policies, geo edge function, submit-match edge function
Client data modules: supabase.js, auth.js, region.js, matchmaking.js, leaderboard.js, net.js assembleMatchResult, player kill/death tracking, stats.test.mjs
Integration pass: reconcile payload shapes, snake_case transform in leaderboard.js, fix onPlayerJoin 4th-arg pass-through, fix _buildMatchPayload field names

Replace the hosted open-rooms browser (open_rooms table, publishRoom/heartbeat/listRooms/subscribeRooms, manual host + room list) with a presence-based hidden 1v1 matchmaker: RegionQueue over Supabase Realtime region channels, deterministic selectPair/electHiddenHost, broadcast match-offer to the guest, net.js matchId/queueId join validation, home-region-first auto-widen with visible status, clean cancel on leave.
acceptance_criteria: Quick Match queues players into their home region and pairs them into a hidden 1v1 via Supabase Realtime presence.
The elected hidden host broadcasts a room code offer; the guest joins over PeerJS and the match auto-starts when both humans connect.
net.js rejects joins whose matchId/queueId do not match the elected pair, while LAN hosts still accept normal joins.
With no match found, the queue auto-widens across regions on a dwell timer and the UI shows the widening/searching status.
Cancelling or leaving during the queue tears down the Realtime channel/presence with no orphaned timers or channels.

features.title: Core combat identity & balance
acceptance_criteria: Ring-out is the primary win condition; raw HP death no longer bypasses knockback/arena position
Chained CC has a diminishing-returns/immunity window
Mob ability damage/knockback scale with player count like MOB_HP_MIN_FACTOR already does
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Core combat identity & balance gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Netcode resilience & matchmaking robustness
acceptance_criteria: ICE negotiation has a TURN relay fallback and surfaces ICE-failure state
A host disconnect triggers migration/re-election instead of ending the match
A dropped client can reconnect and resume the match
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Netcode resilience & matchmaking robustness gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Progression & retention meta
acceptance_criteria: Accounts accrue XP/levels with a persisted schema
A first-pass cosmetic/skin unlock system exists
Matchmaking supports ranked/casual split and leaderboard supports seasons plus self-rank lookup
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Progression & retention meta gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Game modes & PvE content
acceptance_criteria: A team/co-op mode exists alongside FFA
A tournament/bracket structure exists
PvE has wave/elite/difficulty scaling
Practice mode teaches core mechanics via a scripted sequence
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Game modes & PvE content gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Mobile & accessibility parity
acceptance_criteria: Touch players can switch spells mid-match
In-game settings expose volume and graphics quality
Onboarding hotkey capture supports Escape/cancel and skips touch users
Gamepad has a rebinding UI and on-screen glyph prompts
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Mobile & accessibility parity gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Competitive integrity & anti-cheat
acceptance_criteria: Match results carry signature/replay-protection
Ranked/guest lobby identity is validated against a Supabase session
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Competitive integrity & anti-cheat gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Backlog & documentation reconciliation
acceptance_criteria: feature_list.json tracks every real epic/sub-issue
Shipped specs and rune-labels plan are marked done/archived
README spell count is reconciled against config.js SPELLS
Issue #34 is linked as blocked_by on the region-matchmaking epic
features.summary: Roll-up epic for Backlog & documentation reconciliation gaps identified in the feature gap analysis.

features.title: Stop HP damage from bypassing ring-out as the win condition
acceptance_criteria: Raw HP reaching 0 no longer sets alive=false outright; death is gated by arena position/ring-out
Burst spell combos can no longer kill a full-HP player without a knockback/ring-out interaction
features.summary: Stop HP damage from bypassing ring-out as the win condition

acceptance_criteria: A player hit by 2+ CC effects within a short window receives reduced duration or brief immunity
features.summary: Add diminishing returns / immunity window to chained crowd control

features.title: Scale mob ability damage/knockback by player count
acceptance_criteria: Mob abilityDmg and abilityKb scale down for lower player counts like MOB_HP_MIN_FACTOR
features.summary: Scale mob ability damage/knockback by player count
